source.name: Paleobiology Database — Marine Metazoan Genus Diversity (Phanerozoic)

columns.proxy_description: Sampled genus diversity — organization of the marine biosphere.
columns.fragility_note: Sensitive to sampling effort (Pull of the Recent); mitigated by stage-level binning.
columns.manipulability_note: Based on fossil occurrence counts; not user-controllable.

columns.proxy_description: 1 − extinction_rate — resilience: low extinction implies high resilience.
columns.fragility_note: Extinction rate estimated from diversity changes; smoothing affects magnitude.
columns.manipulability_note: Derived from fossil record; robust to manipulation.

columns.proxy_description: Origination rate — integration: capacity to generate evolutionary novelty.
columns.fragility_note: Origination rate inferred from diversity increase; may conflate preservation bias.
columns.manipulability_note: Derived from fossil record; robust to manipulation.

columns.proxy_description: Extinction rate — external stress on the biosphere.
columns.fragility_note: Captures mass extinction events as demand spikes; sensitive to bin resolution.

columns.proxy_description: Cumulative diversity above minimum — symbolic stock of evolutionary innovation.
columns.fragility_note: Cumulative metric; monotonically increasing by construction; robust to point noise.
